features: Welcome to AcademicPulse v1.1.30! This update delivers a massive overhaul to our time-tracking interfaces for a frictionless logging experience, alongside a highly requested feature designed for deep work.
Dedicated Focus Tab: We have introduced a brand new "Focus" tab under the Attendance section, giving you access to customizable Pomodoro, Short/Long Break, and Stopwatch study modes.
Achievement Badges: When you finish a Focus session, you can instantly log your time to earn a shiny gold 🎯 FOCUS badge right on your dashboard's Recent Sessions table.
Instant Duration Previews: The duration preview now fires on the input event, meaning the calculated time updates instantly with every keystroke or scroll wheel change, eliminating the old lag.

Native Theme Integration: Time inputs now intelligently use color-scheme: dark (or color-scheme: light when in Light Mode) so your browser's native clock popup renders perfectly with your app's theme.
Clock Icon Styling: The time picker's clock icon has been upgraded with a blue tint and a new hover highlight for better visibility.

Session Time Redesign: The "Session Time" logging block features a cleaner layout with a visual Start → End arrow, and the calculated duration now appears inside a highlighted pill badge above the manual entry fields.
Pre-filled Edit Modals: When opening the Edit Session modal, the duration badge is now pre-calculated and displayed immediately based on your existing start and end times.

Duplicate Event Handlers: Fixed a bug where opening the Edit Session modal multiple times would stack duplicate event listeners; this was resolved by replacing standard listeners with oninput and onchange property assignments.
